Bash(docker run --rm postgres:16 psql "postgres://ubhqe0lfihbolj:pddd89437e464417ad74828963b25d2a3e55dd86b679b8b988428bdb7f87fc97b@c7s7ncbk19n97r.cluster-czrs8kj4isg7.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com:5432/d881vsgifvt7vm?sslmode=require" -c "
SELECT 
    EXTRACT\(HOUR FROM fecha\) as hora,
    COUNT\(*\) as ordenes,
    SUM\(total\) as ventas
FROM ordenes
WHERE estado = ''cerrada''
GROUP BY hora
ORDER BY hora")

Bash(docker run --rm postgres:16 psql "postgres://ubhqe0lfihbolj:pddd89437e464417ad74828963b25d2a3e55dd86b679b8b988428bdb7f87fc97b@c7s7ncbk19n97r.cluster-czrs8kj4isg7.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com:5432/d881vsgifvt7vm?sslmode=require" -c "
SELECT p.categoria, SUM\(d.cantidad\) as unidades, SUM\(d.cantidad * d.precio_unitario\) as total
FROM detalles_orden d 
JOIN productos p ON d.producto_id = p.id
WHERE d.cantidad > 0
GROUP BY p.categoria
ORDER BY total DESC")

Bash(docker run --rm postgres:16 psql "postgres://ubhqe0lfihbolj:pddd89437e464417ad74828963b25d2a3e55dd86b679b8b988428bdb7f87fc97b@c7s7ncbk19n97r.cluster-czrs8kj4isg7.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com:5432/d881vsgifvt7vm?sslmode=require" -c "
SELECT p.reg_name, COUNT\(o.orden_id\) as visitas, SUM\(o.total\) as total_gastado, AVG\(o.total\) as ticket_promedio
FROM presos p
JOIN ordenes o ON p.id = o.preso_id AND o.estado = ''cerrada''
GROUP BY p.id, p.reg_name
ORDER BY total_gastado DESC
LIMIT 10")

Bash(docker run --rm postgres:16 psql "postgres://ubhqe0lfihbolj:pddd89437e464417ad74828963b25d2a3e55dd86b679b8b988428bdb7f87fc97b@c7s7ncbk19n97r.cluster-czrs8kj4isg7.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com:5432/d881vsgifvt7vm?sslmode=require" -c "
SELECT e.nombre, COUNT\(p.id\) as pagos_cobrados, SUM\(p.propina\) as total_propinas, AVG\(p.propina\) as propina_promedio
FROM empleados e
JOIN pagos p ON e.id = p.empleado_id
WHERE e.rol = ''mesero'' AND e.activo = true
GROUP BY e.id, e.nombre
ORDER BY total_propinas DESC")
